query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `orders` (
  `id` BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `order_number` VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `customer_name` VARCHAR(120),
  `customer_email` VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  `customer_phone` VARCHAR(30),
  `customer_cpf` VARCHAR(20),
  `shipping_zip` VARCHAR(10),
  `shipping_street` VARCHAR(200),
  `shipping_number` VARCHAR(20),
  `shipping_neighborhood` VARCHAR(100),
  `shipping_city` VARCHAR(100),
  `shipping_state` VARCHAR(2),
  `subtotal` DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  `shipping_cost` DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  `discount` DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  `total` DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  `payment_method` ENUM('pix','boleto','card','stripe') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'stripe',
  `payment_status` ENUM('pending','paid','failed','refunded') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `payment_id` VARCHAR(200),
  `payment_gateway` ENUM('stripe','mercadopago') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'stripe',
  `status` ENUM('pending','confirmed','processing','shipped','delivered','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `tracking_code` VARCHAR(100),
  `notes` TEXT,
  `created_at` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `email_idx` (`customer_email`),
  INDEX `status_idx` (`status`),
  INDEX `created_at_idx` (`created_at`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `order_items` (
  `id` BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `order_id` BIGINT NOT NULL,
  `product_id` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  `product_name` VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  `variant_color` VARCHAR(100),
  `variant_color_name` VARCHAR(100),
  `quantity` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `unit_price` DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  `total_price` DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  `image_url` VARCHAR(500),
  INDEX `order_id_idx` (`order_id`),
  FOREIGN KEY (`order_id`) REFERENCES `orders`(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `admin_sessions` (
  `id` BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `token` VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `created_at` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `expires_at` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

  `shipping_cost` DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `order_items` (
  `id` BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `order_id` BIGINT NOT NULL,
  `product_id` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  `product_name` VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  `variant_color` VARCHAR(100),
  `variant_color_name` VARCHAR(100),
  `quantity` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `unit_price` DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  `total_price` DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  `image_url` VARCHAR(500),
  INDEX `order_id_idx` (`order_id`),
  FOREIGN KEY (`order_id`) REFERENCES `orders`(`id`)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `admin_sessions` (
  `id` BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `token` VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `created_at` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `expires_at` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
